examples: Standing still and cooling his brow, he saw a boy running down the hill at topmost speed.
Juste-milieu is the topmost aesthetic ideals.
But tomorrow, make that your topmost priority.
But that showmanship, the glitz and glitter, was only the very topmost surface layer of an entirely remarkable businessman.
The penthouse on the topmost floor, which is yet unsold, has stunning views of a horse-racing track and the Arabian Sea.
